response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription and Translation: Since Ninomae Ina'nis speaks in English, both original language (og) and English translation (en) represent her spoken English dialogue. 2. Timing and Pacing: Carefully structured timestamps to follow the exact moments of vocalization, utilizing truncations for rapid talk and separating long pauses. Mentioned hololive-specific terminology such as 'Tako Tako', 'Senchou', 'Towa-senpai', 'Bae', 'IRyS', and the concert hashtag '#TakoToriFirstConcert' correctly.

subtitles.original: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?
subtitles.english: Are you guys enjoying the show so far?

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Ah, you know, I was really...
subtitles.english: Ah, you know, I was really...

subtitles.original: I want to talk about Tako Tako first because...
subtitles.english: I want to talk about Tako Tako first because...

subtitles.original: ...yesterday, I heard you guys sing along to the instrumental...
subtitles.english: ...yesterday, I heard you guys sing along to the instrumental...

subtitles.original: ...and I was like, "Ah, I feel bad for not singing on Day 1."
subtitles.english: ...and I was like, "Ah, I feel bad for not singing on Day 1."

subtitles.original: But you know, I knew I was opening for, you know, Day 2...
subtitles.english: But you know, I knew I was opening for, you know, Day 2...

subtitles.original: ...so I kind of thought of a better song to open than Tako Tako.
subtitles.english: ...so I kind of thought of a better song to open than Tako Tako.

subtitles.original: So, hope you guys had fun singing it! Thank you again!
subtitles.english: So, hope you guys had fun singing it! Thank you again!

subtitles.original: And of course, I sang two of my senpais' songs...
subtitles.english: And of course, I sang two of my senpais' songs...

subtitles.original: ...Senchou's Dead Man's Chest and Towa-senpai's Palette.
subtitles.english: ...Senchou's Dead Man's Chest and Towa-senpai's Palette.

subtitles.original: Oh, I specifically... I specifically wanted to...
subtitles.english: Oh, I specifically... I specifically wanted to...

subtitles.original: ...choose their songs...
subtitles.english: ...choose their songs...

subtitles.original: ...because they are, you know, senpais that I really look up to.
subtitles.english: ...because they are, you know, senpais that I really look up to.

subtitles.original: And I always feel like...
subtitles.english: And I always feel like...

subtitles.original: ...my journey here wouldn't have been possible if I didn't discover my senpais many, many years ago.
subtitles.english: ...my journey here wouldn't have been possible if I didn't discover my senpais many, many years ago.

subtitles.original: And I always, you know, wanted to pay respect to...
subtitles.english: And I always, you know, wanted to pay respect to...

subtitles.original: ...the path they paved for us.
subtitles.english: ...the path they paved for us.

subtitles.original: So, yeah, I hope you guys enjoyed it!
subtitles.english: So, yeah, I hope you guys enjoyed it!

subtitles.original: I'm so nervous again!
subtitles.english: I'm so nervous again!

subtitles.original: Yeah.
subtitles.english: Yeah.

subtitles.original: And, um, you know, I...
subtitles.english: And, um, you know, I...

subtitles.original: ...of course, didn't really tell you guys specifically what penlight colors to use...
subtitles.english: ...of course, didn't really tell you guys specifically what penlight colors to use...

subtitles.original: ...but I knew you guys would get my message because we share a brain cell, right? Right?
subtitles.english: ...but I knew you guys would get my message because we share a brain cell, right? Right?

subtitles.original: Yeah! So, well...
subtitles.english: Yeah! So, well...

subtitles.english: ...now going by the different setlist, because we, you know, have different setlist for Day 1 and Day 2...

subtitles.original: ...so, you know, going by the process of elimination...
subtitles.english: ...so, you know, going by the process of elimination...

subtitles.english: ...we have a couple of songs from my new EP left. Actually, who...

subtitles.english: ...bought my EP?!

subtitles.original: Yay! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: I hope you were lucky to get an autograph. I tried to sign as much as possible, but...
subtitles.english: I hope you were lucky to get an autograph. I tried to sign as much as possible, but...

subtitles.original: ...I knew, you know, sometimes you can't be lucky.
subtitles.english: ...I knew, you know, sometimes you can't be lucky.

subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you! But yeah, I want you guys to have even more fun than before today.

subtitles.original: I mean, you always have fun, so that's good, but, yeah!
subtitles.english: I mean, you always have fun, so that's good, but, yeah!

subtitles.english: And, you know, sing along, have fun, and...

subtitles.english: ...I always think that a live stage is where not only me performing is creating...

subtitles.original: ...the performance, but you guys as well. You really help...
subtitles.english: ...the performance, but you guys as well. You really help...

subtitles.original: ...you know, help everyone with that special experience.
subtitles.english: ...you know, help everyone with that special experience.

subtitles.original: So let's create an unforgettable memory together today, okay?!
subtitles.english: So let's create an unforgettable memory together today, okay?!

subtitles.original: Yay!
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: Anyways, um...
subtitles.english: Anyways, um...

subtitles.original: ...doing the watch-along, thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: ...doing the watch-along, thank you, thank you!

subtitles.english: Um, you know, I'm always amazed by everyone's support...

subtitles.english: ...the confidence to stand here today. Thank you, I love you!
